article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer define his profile.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry names and the release of a comprehensive sample pack.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer who has established a notable presence in the music industry through his collaborations with prominent artists such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
His work is characterized by a fusion of moombahton and dancehall elements, reflecting a dynamic approach to electronic music production.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid has released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums used across various projects.
This sample pack provides insight into his production techniques and serves as a valuable resource for fellow producers.

Noizekid's profile is further defined by his association with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, all of whom contribute to the evolving landscape of Latin electronic music.
